nasb.text: Now when Saul returned from pursuing the Philistines, he was told, saying, “Behold, David is in the wilderness of Engedi.”

esv.text: When Saul returned from following the Philistines, he was told, “Behold, David is in the wilderness of Engedi.”

cnv.text: 掃羅追趕非利士人回來的時候，有人告訴他說：“看哪，大衛在隱．基底的曠野。”

ccb.text: 扫罗追击非利士人回来，得知大卫在隐·基底的旷野，
